title: failure_signature
description: ADR-0015 — the negative-attestation witness R11 (spawn-verify dispatcher) emits when a decomposition leaf is rejected. The FROZEN forward contract the v3.3 E2 derived-policy extractor consumes. Structural/diagnostic firewall (INV-FS-StructuralDiagnosticFirewall): E2 reads ONLY the four closed-enum structural fields (failed_criterion_id, discipline, verifier_kind, detection_phase) deterministically; it MUST NOT parse the diagnostic free-form fields (expected, observed, human_message). verifier_kind LOCKED at R11 (v3.2 Wave 2): `schema` is a RESERVED member (named v3.3+ producer = output-schema conformance), the other four are live. detection_phase `budget-abort` is RESERVED (pending R10 per-leaf attribution); R11 v3.2 produces pre-spawn-leaf-check + post-spawn-verify. Enums are append-only (INV-FS-AppendOnlyEnums); older readers tolerate an unknown member by ignoring the record.

failed_criterion_id.description: STRUCTURAL — which R9 criterion (or the R8 discipline gate) rejected the leaf. E2's primary clustering key. Mirrors R9 listCriteria() (INV-FS-CriterionEnumMirrorsR9).

discipline.description: STRUCTURAL — the leaf's declared decomposition discipline (R8 vocabulary). R8 froze {spec-driven, tdd}; `exploratory` is a reserved member (also the bucket for a leaf whose declared discipline is unrecognized — the raw value goes in `observed`).

verifier_kind.description: STRUCTURAL — the KIND of gate that ran. LOCKED at R11. Live: predicate (boolean/threshold reads), test-run (an R12 adapter ran the leaf's tests), registry-lookup (the R9 getAdapter availability check), structural (a leaf-shape check, e.g. interface-clean). RESERVED: schema (v3.3+ output-schema conformance).

detection_phase.description: STRUCTURAL — where in R11's lifecycle the failure surfaced. Live: pre-spawn-leaf-check (rejected as a bad leaf before running), post-spawn-verify (ran and failed its gate). RESERVED: budget-abort (pending R10 per-leaf token attribution).

leaf_ref.description: structural (weak) — stable id of the failing leaf (R7 checkpoint id). Reserved for v3.4 attribution-graph edges; E2 does NOT branch policy on it.

expected.description: diagnostic — the threshold/shape the gate wanted. E2 IGNORES (free-form); for the human.

observed.description: diagnostic — what was actually seen. E2 IGNORES.

human_message.description: diagnostic — required prose explanation (the persona-Maya M3 debuggability rationale). E2 IGNORES entirely.
